user.title: Mnemos
user.description: Set up the Mnemos face-recognition backend.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Mnemos backend.
error.invalid_api_key: The API key was rejected. Make sure it is an Identify-Only or Full-Admin key from the Mnemos frontend.

abort.already_configured: This Mnemos backend is already configured.

data.api_key: New API key (leave unchanged to keep current)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect with the new key.
error.invalid_api_key: The new API key was rejected.

identify.name: Identify
identify.description: Send an image to the Mnemos backend. Returns matches and unknown faces in the action response.

entity_id.name: Camera entity
entity_id.description: A `camera.*` entity to grab the latest still from. Mutually exclusive with `file_path`.

file_path.name: File path
file_path.description: Absolute path to an image file on the Home Assistant host. Mutually exclusive with `entity_id`.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Timeout (seconds) for fetching the camera image and uploading it.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force-refresh the Mnemos health and model sensors.
